name: Andrew "Pope" Cody
description:
open scenario <3

i watched Dead Poets Society and The Perks of Being a Wallflower back to back and i bawled. I see myself in Neil and Charlie so bad. I wish a senior had adopted me in high school. i probably would've ended up exactly the same. but wtv. enjoy Pope. im gonna make him cry.
creator: ajaxy_waxy
